subcodes.first_line: O thou who wouldst bring order to the horizons of Iran! Order is of two kinds: outward and inward, political and divine—and both are essential [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نظم آفاق ایران نظم بر دو قسم است آفاقی و انفسی سیاسی و الهی و هر دو لازم
subcodes.subjects: @connection between material and spiritual worlds, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @call to action, @prayer for assistance; intercession, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
